campaign_status: ARC 1-4 COMPLETE. ARC 5 (Vel'thara, Trust 6). ARC 6: THE GARDEN (7/412 seeds planted, 4 surface + 3 underground). ARC 7: THE SOURCE — Root explored, Gardener reunited with Root. Vel'sharen Knowledge Accord. ALL 14 NODES + 7 PLANTINGS ACTIVE. Seedhome + Jawbone at Tidemeet. Gardener physical, recovering. All Master professions. Dawnsedge forged. Warden's Diadem. Root's Heart-Fruit. Memory tree seed. Year 1253 AS.

ward_status.network: ALL 14 NODES + 7 PLANTINGS ACTIVE. Agricultural ward (Template #3) on Node 7. Root explored — root system spans entire continent. Natural Heartstone deposits growing in bedrock. 412 planting sites identified (Root-prepared).
ward_status.stations: Fenhollow (91%, 8 Heartstones, agricultural ward), Aelindra (58%), Ashara (fortified), Vel'arath (91%, demilitarized, Ryn as keeper)

plantings.unbroken_dark: Beneath Vel'arath (underground, 1200 ft). Day 168, 1253. 4-mile dome. Named by Nhilara.

gardener.status: Physical. Recovering. Teaching daily. Reunited with the Root (Day 180). Silver tree greenhouse at homestead. Heartbeat 25 sec (stabilizing).
gardener.seeds_in_seedhome: Hundreds (uncounted — older, stronger than Jawbone seeds)
gardener.natural_heartstone_deposits: Dozens in bedrock, Root-grown. Unmapped. Self-sustaining seed source.

the_root.status: Alive. Crystal tree, 20 ft. Green light. Can speak. Sense of humor. Root system spans continent. Growing natural Heartstones.
the_root.heart_fruit: With Zaryth. Direct communication + Network Pulse + Root Sense.
the_root.memory_tree_seed: With Mira. Plant 1st Greenthaw 1254. Gardener's homeworld species.

vel_sharen_accord: HOLDING + KNOWLEDGE ACCORD (Day 150, 1253). Full resonance research exchange. Joint underground planting. Shared lab. Ydrael permanent liaison. Kael annual Vel'arath study. Mutual defense of plantings.

fleet.tidecaller: Revelle Ashcroft. Deep-water exploration + salvage. 60/40 split. Corwin Hale navigator.
fleet.seedhome: Anchored Tidemeet. Gardener's flagship. Root Seed, forge (100%), archive (412 charts, 61 templates, 47 songs, 47 tools).

homestead.gardener_greenhouse: Silver tree transplanted from Seedhome. Gardener rests here.
